name: @contextify/vscode-extension
description: Drop or paste UI screenshots into VS Code — Contextify turns them into structured developer markdown.

contextify.backendUrl.description: Base URL of the Contextify backend (e.g. http://localhost:3000).

contextify.timeoutMs.description: Maximum time (ms) to wait for a screenshot analysis to complete.

enumDescriptions: Use the backend's configured LLM (no key sent).
contextify.llm.provider.markdownDescription: Advanced: which LLM provider to use for analysis. Choose `default` to use the backend's own key, or pick a provider and supply your own key in `#contextify.llm.apiKey#`.

contextify.llm.apiKey.markdownDescription: Advanced: your own API key for the selected `#contextify.llm.provider#`. Sent to the backend with each upload and never stored server-side. Leave blank to use the backend's default key.

contextify.llm.model.markdownDescription: Advanced: model id for the selected provider (e.g. `gemini-2.0-flash`, `gpt-4o`, `claude-3-5-sonnet-latest`). Leave blank for the provider's default.
